title: Emerald tools and more
description: This project adds a full set of high-durability, Emerald tools, weapons, and armor to Minecraft.
body:
## Emerald tools and More

****EmeraldToolsAndMore**** is a Fabric mod that introduces a powerful new tier of equipment crafted from Emerald, providing a sleek and durable alternative for late-game survival.

### Features
This mod adds a comprehensive set of Emerald-based gear to the game:

****Standard Tools:**** High-performance Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, and Hoe.

****Combat Weapons:**** A sharp Emerald Sword and a unique Emerald Spear featuring custom stabbing animations.

****Protective Armor:**** A full suit of Emerald Armor, including Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots.

****Specialty Items:**** Emerald Horse Armor and Emerald Nautilus Armor for your companions and utility.

****Special Ability:**** Grants a 40% discount at all merchants when the full armor set is worn.


### Why download this mod?
The standout feature of all Emerald equipment in this mod is its High-performance. Your tools and armor will not break fast and are highly enchantable, making them the perfect choice for every day's task's. With durability and efficiency stats that provide a meaningful upgrade over standard materials, it offers both a functional advantage and a premium green aesthetic.

### Technical Information
- Loader: Fabric
- Minecraft Version: Optimized for 26.1+
- Dependencies: Requires the Fabric API to be installed.
